title: solanum commersonii subsp. malmeanum
intro: Solanum commersonii subsp. malmeanum, also known as Malmean nightshade, is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Solanum commersonii subsp. malmeanum are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
